axioms.name: Gravitational Constant
axioms.description: Standard Newtonian gravity. High values slow vertical movement and increase fall damage.

axioms.name: Temporal Flow Ratio
axioms.description: Speed of time relative to the baseline world. High values accelerate simulation events.

axioms.name: Entropy Decay
axioms.description: The inevitable decay of energy and order. Higher values increase resource consumption.

axioms.name: Causal Determinism
axioms.description: How strictly effects follow causes. Lower determinism allows for more chaotic outcomes.

axioms.name: Qi Fluidity
axioms.description: Resistance to inner energy flow. Critical for Wuxia/Kiếm Hiệp worlds.

axioms.name: Soul Stability
axioms.description: Probability of a soul surviving the death of the biological shell.

axioms.name: Spirit Root Affinity
axioms.description: Determines how easily souls can absorb external energy for cultivation.

axioms.name: Heavenly Tribulation
axioms.description: Severity of challenges imposed by the 'Dao' when entities attempt to reach higher tiers.

axioms.name: Spiritual Qi Density
axioms.description: Ambient magical or spiritual energy available in the environment.

axioms.name: Mana Coherence
axioms.description: The stability of magical fields. Low coherence causes unpredictable spell backfires.

axioms.name: Might is Right
axioms.description: Direct correlation between physical/metaphysical power and legal authority.

axioms.name: Information Velocity
axioms.description: The speed at which new concepts and skills spread throughout the population.

axioms.name: Hierarchical Inertia
axioms.description: The resistance to changing one's social standing or vocation tier.

axioms.name: Concept Over Matter
axioms.description: The ability of will or abstract concepts to override physical constants.

axioms.name: Destiny Pull
axioms.description: The influence of 'Story Logic' over standard simulation logic. Higher tiers force epic conclusions.
